allow: Bash(pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "[System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\(''demos/m5-security-overview-commands.ps1'', [ref]$null, [ref]$null\) | Out-Null; $errors = [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\(''demos/m5-security-overview-commands.ps1'', [ref]$null, [ref]$null\); Write-Host ''Parse completed successfully - no errors''")

Bash(pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command '$tokens = $null; $errors = $null; [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\(""demos/m5-security-overview-commands.ps1"", [ref]$tokens, [ref]$errors\) | Out-Null; if \($errors.Count -eq 0\) { Write-Host ""No parse errors found"" } else { $errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Host ""ERROR: $\($_.Message\) at line $\($_.Extent.StartLineNumber\)"" } }')
